narrative:
Van Wert City has 7,506 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
